title: Submarine Base
writer: Arthur St. Claire, George M. Merrick
actors: John Litel, Alan Baxter, Eric Blore
plot: Ship engineer Jim Taggert is rescued from a torpedoed tramp steamer by Joe Morgan, an American gangster that found New York too hot for him, and has become a fisherman operating from an out-of-the-way island off of the coast of So...
